mapper.select:
SELECT id, intent_node_id, knowledge_base_id, created_at FROM intent_knowledge_base WHERE intent_node_id IN
CAST(#{intentNodeId} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO intent_knowledge_base ( id, intent_node_id, knowledge_base_id, created_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS uuid), CAST(#{intentNodeId} AS uuid), CAST(#{knowledgeBaseId} AS uuid), #{createdAt} )

INSERT INTO intent_knowledge_base ( id, intent_node_id, knowledge_base_id, created_at ) VALUES
( CAST(#{item.id} AS uuid), CAST(#{item.intentNodeId} AS uuid), CAST(#{item.knowledgeBaseId} AS uuid), #{item.createdAt} )
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM intent_knowledge_base WHERE intent_node_id IN
CAST(#{intentNodeId} AS uuid)
DELETE FROM intent_knowledge_base WHERE knowledge_base_id = CAST(#{knowledgeBaseId} AS uuid)
